nodes.label: AI as task management and overwhelm reducer
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of rigid or unhelpful scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: reduce overwhelm, by helping me manage my day

nodes.label: AI as collaborative iterative partner
nodes.grounding_span: collaborate until I reach a point that I am happy with

nodes.label: AI reliability in coding tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability and errors in code
nodes.grounding_span: AI will claim that the code will do something, and I'll either clearly see it's not meeting my requirements or I'll try it and there will be some error

nodes.label: AI as starting point for writing with tone control
nodes.label_negative: AI as insufficient for nuanced tone
nodes.grounding_span: writing tasks tend to be where I might use AI as a starting point, and then handle the rest myself

nodes.label: Human-in-the-loop oversight for quality and safety
nodes.label_negative: Full AI autonomy without human check
nodes.grounding_span: there should be a human-in-the-loop to make sure things are working as expected

nodes.label: Quality and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: make sure things are working as expected

nodes.label: Personal expression and relationship nuance
nodes.grounding_span: depending on the person I might want to tweak the tone because we have a particular relationship

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI when requirements are precise
nodes.grounding_span: satisfying moments are when I get the requirements just right, and I'm able to plug and play code

nodes.label: Frustration with AI coding errors
nodes.grounding_span: frustrating because the AI will claim that the code will do something, and I'll either clearly see it's not meeting my requirements or I'll try it and there will be some error

nodes.label: Preference for human control in writing tone
nodes.grounding_span: if I tried using AI as a starting point and didn't feel like it fit my goal

nodes.label: Concern about skill obsolescence and need for human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I do have concerns in general. I've considered certifications (security related) and even maybe doing a degree in a field where AI will not be as dominant

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative refinement — back-and-forth adjustment
nodes.grounding_span: collaborate until I reach a point that I am happy with

nodes.label: Contextual adaptation — tailoring based on audience and relationship
nodes.grounding_span: depending on the person I might want to tweak the tone because we have a particular relationship
